sites.name: Stripe
sites.note: Payments infrastructure. Anchored at the company's public launch — earlier stripe.com captures (1996–2010) belong to a previous domain owner.

sites.name: EasyPost
sites.note: Shipping API for logistics. Anchored at the shipping company's era — earlier easypost.com captures (1998–2000) belong to a previous domain owner; the modern site begins April 2013 (founded 2012, YC S13).

sites.name: ShipStation
sites.note: Multichannel shipping/order-management software (founded 2011). Anchored at launch — earlier shipstation.com captures (2001) belong to a previous owner and Feb 2011 was still a parked domain; the real site begins Sept 2011.
